# Lana Tutors

> Lana Tutors connects parents and students with verified Kenyan teachers for online and in-person one-on-one tutoring across CBC, KCSE (8-4-4), IGCSE, A-Level, IB, and American curricula. Headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya, serving students locally and across the African diaspora (UK, USA, Canada, UAE, and beyond).

Lana Tutors is a Kenyan tutoring platform. Tutors are verified classroom teachers — many are KCSE examiners or markers from top Kenyan schools. Sessions are delivered over Google Meet (online) or in-person in Nairobi, Mombasa, and Kisumu. Pricing is in Kenyan Shillings with multi-currency display (USD, EUR, GBP, KES, TZS, UGX). All assessment calls and bookings resolve to East Africa Time (EAT, Africa/Nairobi).

## Key facts
- Founded and headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya
- Specializes in Kenyan curricula (CBC, KCSE/8-4-4) and major international curricula (IGCSE, A-Level, IB, American/AP)
- Verified tutors only — credential-checked classroom teachers, including KCSE markers
- One-on-one online lessons via Google Meet; in-person sessions available in Nairobi
- Serves Kenyan diaspora families in the UK, USA, Canada, UAE, Australia
- Free 30-minute Academic Assessment Calls before committing to a tutor
- Custom Learning Plans designed by senior educators for long-term goals
- Group classes and December Intensive holiday programs
- Pricing: typically KES 1,500 – KES 3,500 per hour depending on curriculum and level
- Contact: info@lanatutors.africa

## Core pages
- [Home](/): Platform overview and value proposition
- [Find Tutors](/tutors): Browse and filter verified Kenyan tutors by subject, curriculum, and level
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of booking, sessions, and payment
- [About Lana Tutors](/about): Company background and mission
- [For Students & Parents](/for-students): Information for families considering tutoring
- [For Tutors](/for-tutors): Information for teachers wanting to join the platform
- [Become a Tutor](/become-a-tutor): Tutor application
- [Book a Free Assessment Call](/book-consultation): Schedule a 30-minute consultation with the Lana academic team
- [Request a Learning Plan](/request-learning-plan): Get a custom multi-session plan designed for your child
- [Group Classes](/group-classes): Small-group classes by curriculum and subject
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on Kenyan education, exam prep, and parenting

## Subject pages
- [Mathematics Tutors](/subjects/mathematics): CBC, KCSE, IGCSE 0580, IB Maths AA & AI
- [Chemistry Tutors](/subjects/chemistry): KCSE, IGCSE 0620, IB Chemistry SL/HL
- [Physics Tutors](/subjects/physics): KCSE, IGCSE 0625, IB Physics SL/HL
- [Biology Tutors](/subjects/biology): KCSE, IGCSE 0610, IB Biology SL/HL
- [English Tutors](/subjects/english): KCSE, IGCSE First Language English 0500, IB English
- [Kiswahili Tutors](/subjects/kiswahili): KCSE, CBC, and IB Kiswahili
- [Business Studies Tutors](/subjects/business-studies): KCSE and IGCSE Business
- [Computer Studies Tutors](/subjects/computer-studies): KCSE Computer Studies and IGCSE ICT
- [Geography Tutors](/subjects/geography): KCSE and IGCSE Geography
- [History Tutors](/subjects/history): KCSE History & Government, IGCSE History

## Curriculum × Mathematics pages
- [KCSE Mathematics Tutors](/kcse-mathematics-tutors): KCSE Paper 1 & 2 preparation
- [IGCSE Mathematics Tutors](/igcse-mathematics-tutors): IGCSE 0580 and 0607 preparation
- [IB Mathematics Tutors](/ib-mathematics-tutors): IB Maths AA and AI, SL and HL
- [CBC Mathematics Tutors](/cbc-mathematics-tutors): CBC Grade 1 – Grade 9 mathematics
